name: Eggplant Flan
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine eggplant in a bowl with salt and let it sit for 20 minutes.
2. Rinse under running water and squeeze out excess moisture. Set aside.
3. Lightly oil a 2-quart casserole or soufflé dish.
4. In a 10-inch no-stick skillet over medium-high heat, sauté garlic, onion, and pepper in olive oil and stock until soft but not browned.
5. In a small bowl, whisk together eggs (or egg substitute), chives, and yogurt.
6. Add the vegetables to the egg mixture and mix well.
7. Pour into the soufflé dish.
8. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
9. Serve hot with tomato coulis.
Makes 4 to 6 servings
TOMATO COULIS
2 Teaspoons Olive Oil
1 Small Onion, Minced
2 Garlic Cloves, Minced
3 Medium Tomatoes, Chopped
1 Teaspoon Tomato Paste
1 Teaspoon Honey
Mix all ingredients in a medium bowl until well blended.
